name: measuretent

scripts.package:all: pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm -C packages/shared pack --pack-destination ../../artifacts && pnpm -C packages/config pack --pack-destination ../../artifacts && pnpm -C packages/engine pack --pack-destination ../../artifacts && pnpm -C packages/api pack --pack-destination ../../artifacts && pnpm -C packages/sdk pack --pack-destination ../../artifacts

description: MeasureTent is a config-driven tent sizing and event layout platform with Fastify API, TypeScript engine, and React UI.
